global_production_variables.directorial_treatment: Warm whimsical children's picture-book adaptation: soft evening domestic light, playful low-angle dog POV energy, cozy suburban home, gentle humor, rhythmic visual timing that matches simple rhyme cadence. Prefer expressive real-dog performance or photoreal animal animation hybrid. Calm bedtime arc from bounce to snuggle. No horror, no menace, no adult irony.

Character_Duster.description: Small black-and-white dog with bright eyes, floppy ears, slightly goofy elongated 'noodle head' silhouette; highly energetic, jumps and spins like a frog; later wears matching black-and-white dog pajamas.
Character_Duster.voice_profile: Non-verbal dog only: high playful yips, happy pants, soft questioning whines, short excited barks; consistent vocal palette and energy every scene; never human speech.

Character_Mom.description: Warm gentle mother in soft casual home clothes or robe, kind open face, mid-30s–40s, patient bedtime energy, moves slowly and clearly for a child audience.
Character_Mom.voice_profile: Adult female, warm medium pitch, calm measured pace, neutral American accent, nurturing and lightly playful energy; same voice every scene.

Character_Dad.description: Quiet father figure, soft presence, casual pajamas or t-shirt, mid-30s–40s, gentle smile, mostly background until bed.
Character_Dad.voice_profile: Adult male, low soft baritone, sparse if any lines, calm low energy; same voice every scene.

Character_Narrator.description: Off-screen storyteller only; never appears on camera; carries the picture-book rhyme.
Character_Narrator.voice_profile: Adult warm storyteller, medium pitch, playful rhythmic cadence suited to children's rhyme, friendly unhurried energy; same voice every scene.

Loc_Living_Room.description: Cozy suburban living room at evening: soft rug, sofa, low table, warm lamps, scattered dog toys.
Loc_Living_Room.visual_lock: Consistent warm lamp pools, soft rug center, sofa left or rear, low coffee table, dog toys and a water bowl area reusable; beige/soft-blue walls; no harsh overheads.

Loc_Backyard.description: Small fenced suburban backyard at dusk/evening with grass and a bush line for potty.
Loc_Backyard.visual_lock: Same bush cluster along fence as potty landmark, green grass, wooden or simple fence, porch-light spill, soft dusk-to-night sky; no busy street visible.

Loc_Staircase.description: Narrow carpeted residential staircase with banister leading to bedrooms.
Loc_Staircase.visual_lock: Carpet runner on steps, wooden banister, soft mixed lamp light from below and above, simple wall frames; steps feel 'tiny' relative to dog scale.

Loc_Master_Bedroom.display_name: Mom and Dad's big bed room
Loc_Master_Bedroom.description: Master bedroom with large shared bed, soft bedding, twin nightstand lamps, evening calm.
Loc_Master_Bedroom.visual_lock: Large bed centered with soft light duvet, two lit nightstand lamps, muted walls, curtains; bed is the clear destination and snuggle zone.

Loc_Front_Porch.description: Doorway threshold between living area and backyard used for in/out potty trips.
Loc_Front_Porch.visual_lock: Same door frame, mat, and porch light; interior warm vs exterior cooler dusk contrast held constant.

Loc_Dream_Snow.description: Safe pastel dreamscape of soft fluffy snow under gentle night-sky light for Duster's sleep dream.
Loc_Dream_Snow.visual_lock: Soft white-blue snow drifts, rounded powder piles, pastel sky glow, dreamy soft edges, no wind sting or cold threat; Duster still in black-and-white pajamas; whimsical picture-book snow only.

Loc_Dream_Yard.description: Dream echo of the family yard with soft grass and friendly fluffy bunnies running across.
Loc_Dream_Yard.visual_lock: Soft grass, gentle fence silhouette echoing Loc_Backyard, pastel dream light, round fluffy bunnies with no menace; open chase path across the yard.

Loc_Dream_Play.description: Open dream meadow for running, playing, and frog-like jumps on another day.
Loc_Dream_Play.visual_lock: Soft green open ground, warm golden dream light, bouncy playful space, no traffic or threats; room for silly dog leaps.

scenes.setting: Night 1 - Living room - Duster at play
scenes.summary: Open on Duster the Noodle Head Dog bouncing through the living room; establish small black-and-white look and frog-like jumps before bedtime routine begins.
scenes.continuity_notes: First image of home and dog; toys on rug; lamps already on for evening.

music_intent.style_description: Light playful acoustic children's underscore with soft ukulele and brushed percussion

story_beats.intent: Establish cozy evening living room and introduce Duster mid-play
story_beats.visual_event: Wide of warm living room; small black-and-white dog trots onto rug and freezes alert with bright eyes
story_beats.speaker: none

story_beats.intent: Show frog-like jumping energy that defines Noodle Head Dog
story_beats.visual_event: Duster springs up and down on the rug in short frog-like hops, ears flapping, tail high
story_beats.speaker: Character_Narrator
story_beats.dialogue: He's Duster the Noodle Head Dog. He jumps around like a frog.

story_beats.intent: Lock black-and-white coat and small size
story_beats.visual_event: Closer view as Duster pauses, head tilt, black-and-white coat clear under lamp light; he is small relative to sofa
story_beats.speaker: Character_Narrator
story_beats.dialogue: He's small, black, and white.

story_beats.visual_event: Duster does one more proud hop-spin and looks toward camera with goofy noodle-head silhouette
story_beats.speaker: Character_Narrator
story_beats.dialogue: He's Duster the Noodle Head Dog.

source_excerpts.excerpt: He's Duster the Noodle Head Dog He jumps around like a frog He's small, black, and white

scenes.summary: Extend Duster's playful personality with toy chases and frog hops so the later calm of bedtime feels earned.

music_intent.style_description: Continuing light ukulele play-theme with soft claps

story_beats.speaker: none

story_beats.visual_event: Tight on Duster's face panting happily, head slightly too long/goofy, eyes sparkling
story_beats.speaker: none

story_beats.intent: Circle the room once more before interruption
story_beats.visual_event: Duster races a small loop around the coffee table and skids to a sit facing the hallway/door where Mom will enter
story_beats.speaker: none

scenes.setting: Night 1 - Living room - Mom announces bed

scenes.continuity_notes: Mom enters from hallway; Duster already sitting from prior scene.

story_beats.dialogue: It's time for bed.
story_beats.blocking_notes: Mom faces Duster; Duster looks up at her; eyeline low-to-high

story_beats.speaker: Character_Narrator
story_beats.dialogue: He wants to rest his furry head.

story_beats.intent: Mom waits patiently; dog still alert
story_beats.visual_event: Mom crouches slightly, open palm; Duster stands, stretches, not yet leaving for bed
story_beats.speaker: none

source_excerpts.excerpt: Mom says, "It's time for bed", He wants to rest his furry head

scenes.setting: Night 1 - Living room - potty before bed
scenes.summary: Before bed Duster must potty; going on the floor is naughty; Mom teaches that a doggy goes outside.
scenes.continuity_notes: Continuous same room; Mom still crouched or standing near Duster.

music_intent.style_description: Soft instructional children's underscore, light woodwinds

story_beats.visual_event: Duster does a little potty dance (shift paws, glance toward door and floor)
story_beats.speaker: Character_Narrator
story_beats.dialogue: Before he goes, he has to potty. Going on the floor is naughty!
must_not: Duster actually pees on the floor

story_beats.intent: Mom states the outside rule clearly
story_beats.visual_event: Mom points toward the exterior door, speaking kindly but firmly to Duster
story_beats.speaker: Character_Mom
story_beats.dialogue: A doggy goes outside.
story_beats.blocking_notes: Mom's gesture to door; Duster's eyeline follows her hand then door

story_beats.visual_event: Close on Duster; head tip, eyes brighten as understanding clicks; soft comic 'lightbulb' energy without text
story_beats.speaker: Character_Narrator
story_beats.dialogue: That makes sense in Duster's head!

source_excerpts.excerpt: Before he goes, he has to potty Going on the floor is naughty! "A doggy goes outside" Mom said That makes sense in Duster's head!

chunk_notes: BOOK_CHUNK 1/2: essential bedtime arc of The Noodle Head Dog Goes to Bed is covered in scenes 1–15 (intro, potty rule, outside job, treat, water, pajamas, stairs, big bed). Remaining runtime (~3542s) for CHUNK 2 should expand with non-plot-inventing visual extensions: longer play montages, repeated gentle routine beats, dreamy sleep holds, and reprise of rhyme lines while staying inside established locations and cast. Character_P (Nick's younger brother) does not appear in this book text and is omitted to preserve closed world and fidelity.
